status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
notes: See also registry/entity/il/gov.json for the Privacy Protection Authority and registry/control/il/gov.json for Israel's AI policy.

data.description: Israel's foundational privacy statute, enacted by the Knesset. Amendment No. 13 (passed August 5, 2024, effective August 14, 2025) is the largest overhaul since 1981, adding DPO requirements, database-registration streamlining, and GDPR-aligned enforcement powers.
